headline: D.R. Horton's Q2 Earnings Preview: What Investors Must Know Now?
summary: DHI heads into Q2 with steadier traffic and higher closings, yet elevated mortgage rates and ownership costs still curb demand.

headline: Spotting Winners: EMCOR (NYSE:EME) And Engineering and Design Services Stocks In Q4
summary: Looking back on engineering and design services stocks’ Q4 earnings, we examine this quarter’s best and worst performers, including EMCOR (NYSE:EME) and its peers.
